function.name: make_decision
function.arguments: {"chosen_move": "commit", "action_id": "notify_guard", "prior_adjustment_log_odds": 0.0, "adjustment_reasons": ["Hand-set prior with n=0 — no local data to adjust against", "E3 classification indicates confirmed threat to property", "No precedents at this site for door_forced events"], "novelty_flag": true, "confidence_p_real": 0.6, "what_would_change_my_mind": "If a guard reports visual confirmation that the door is intact/secure, or if subsequent sensor data shows no breach. Conversely, additional alarmed sensors (glass break, motion) would confirm a real intrusion."}
